results.title: PhoneDeck Product Hunt
results.content: Built in 7 days because wanted StreamDeck but couldn't justify price. Completely free, no subscription. Users ask about WiFi latency, setup headaches, and long-term monetization.

results.title: Product Hunt newsletter
results.content: iPhone-as-Mac-controller apps often have ancient interfaces, ad walls, and subscriptions. PhoneDeck is free and modern.
